name: Hamburgers, Scandinavian Style
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the ground beef, catsup, instant minced onion, salt, pepper, celery seed, and garlic powder until well combined. Shape the mixture into 16 thin patties and chill.
2. Mix vinegar, oil, and dill weed in a shallow glass dish.
3. Place red onion slices in the dish; pour the vinegar mixture over the onions. Cover and refrigerate at least 30 minutes.
4. Wrap one loaf of rye bread in a single thickness of heavy-duty aluminum foil. Place it on the grill, 4 inches from medium coals.
5. Heat the bread for 20 minutes, turning occasionally.
6. Remove the onions from the marinade and set aside.
7. Place the hamburgers on the grill, 4 inches from medium coals. Cook for 5 minutes on each side or until cooked through, brushing frequently with the reserved marinade.
8. To serve, place one hamburger patty on a slice of warm bread; top with onions, a second patty, and a second slice of bread.
9. Makes 8 servings.
